docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-03-2018 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,660.15 FILED BY HOMESHARE INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DEMARCO, KIEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-13-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $45.00 SERVED AUG-02-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DEMARCO, KIEL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-13-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-13-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY ASHTON LUONG, BUSINESS OPERATIONS. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT AND WAIVES SERVICE. PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 9/21/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR BY ASHTON LONG FOR PLTFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOMESHARE INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOMESHARE INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-13-2018 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOMESHARE INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DEMARCO, KIEL $1,532.23 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,627.23, HOMESHARE SEEKS RENT FOR 7/23/18- 8/22/18 AND UTILITIES. THE COURT AWARDS THESE AMOUNTS ONLY. MR. DEMARCO DID NOT SUBSTANTIATE THE CONCERNS HE RAISED ABOUT HOMESHARE'S BUSINESS MODEL. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
